{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Steps to submit service form{% endblock %} {% block navContent %} {% include "Common/navbar_content.html" %} {% endblock navContent %} {% block body %} {% include "Vendor/sub_menu.html" %}

Steps to submit service form

{% endblock body %} {% block card_content %}

  1. Click on the Register a service tab

    This will open up the form

  2. Fill up the required details

    * indicates mandatory field. It is required to fill

  3. Click on submit button

    It will submit the form and appear in My Products tab
{% endblock card_content%}
